info.name: Chaewon Im
info.about: Frontend Engineer with 4+ years of experience contributing to large-scale web services at Nexon Korea. Skilled in frontend architecture, legacy system modernization, and workflow automation, delivering practical solutions under tight timelines. With a background in design, I collaborate closely with UX/UI designers to create visually engaging and performance-conscious web experiences. Committed to improving development processes and enabling teams to work more efficiently.

projects.name: Azure Promilia (KR) – Official Website Launch
bullets: Led frontend development from project initiation to launch
Designed scalable project structure and reusable component architecture
Implemented validation layer for internal API integration
Built and optimize interactive UI features (character sliders, animated map interactions)
Established load testing strategy for up to 5,000 concurrent users
Reduced delivery timeline by 50% through structured planning and cross-functional collaboration

projects.name: NEXON Official Game Website Maintenance & Development Interactive Web Campaigns
bullets: Implemented the organization’s first three.js-based 3D web gallery
Developed interactive card-combination logic for Mabinogi Mobile pre-registration event
Built in-game connected web event experience for Mabinogi Heroes
Handled multilingual localization for global game event websites, including MapleStory M and Blue Archive

projects.name: Mabinogi Heroes (KR/NA) – Website Modernization & Automation
bullets: Led modernization of a legacy website into a React + Vite architecture
Designed branch strategy separating development and production environments, improving security stability by 30%
Built automated build and deployment scripts, reducing deployment process timelines by 80%
Standardized reusable event templates and shared component structures, reducing development timelines by 50%

education.title: EDUCATION
bullets: Bachelor of Arts in Visual & Multimedia Design
Bachelor of Science in IT Engineering
